mapper.select: SELECT o.*, c.title as coupon_title FROM t_order o JOIN coupon c ON o.coupon_id = c.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
SELECT o.*, c.title as coupon_title FROM t_order o JOIN coupon c ON o.coupon_id = c.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (user_id, coupon_id, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{couponId}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND coupon_id = #{couponId}
